description: A formal piece of correspondence or notice sent by an insurance provider regarding policy changes, claim updates, billing notifications, or benefit payments.

first_name.instruction: First name of the policy beneficiary or insured.

recipient_ssn.instruction: Social Security Number of the recipient. Reformat as XXX-XX-XXXX.

recipient_state.instruction: State of the recipient. Two-letter code.

insurance_company_name.instruction: The official name of the insurance company or provider issuing the letter.

policy_number.instruction: The insurance policy or member identification number referenced in the text.

policy_type.instruction: Type of insurance (life, disability, settlement, etc.).

payment_amount.instruction: Lump sum or periodic payment amount.

payment_type.instruction: Whether payment is lump sum or periodic.

payment_frequency.instruction: Frequency of payment if periodic (monthly, quarterly, annual).

effective_date.instruction: Date the benefit or payment becomes effective. YYYY-MM-DD format.

termination_date.instruction: Date that insurance policy has been terminated. YYYY-MM-DD format.

expiration_date.instruction: Date that insurance policy expires. YYYY-MM-DD format.

letter_date.instruction: Date the letter or notice was officially issued. YYYY-MM-DD format.

cash_surrender_value.instruction: Cash value of life insurance policy if applicable.
